claim_text: CDC PLACES publishes census-tract-level chronic-disease prevalence for 83522 tracts in the 2025 release covering BRFSS 2022 and ACS 2018-2022
CDC PLACES landing page confirms data portal and tract/ZCTA/place/county geographies available
USALEEP census-tract life expectancy data covers 2010-2015 deaths and is hosted on the CDC FTP server
USALEEP raw files available at the CDC Health Statistics FTP in XLSX and CSV
CDC WONDER provides underlying-cause-of-death micro-queries from 1999 to present with small-cell suppression for cells under 10 deaths
NCHS NVSS downloadable final data available via CDC WONDER for public use and via NCHS Research Data Center for restricted micro-data
Chicago Health Atlas hosts 160+ community-area health indicators with CSV/XLSX bulk download
BRFSS SMART MMSA 2023 data released December 2024 available as ASCII and SAS XPT
SAHIE Small Area Health Insurance Estimates covers 2008-2023 at state and county level (no tract)
County Health Rankings homepage indicates no typical 2026 annual release; 2014-2023 mortality data referenced
ACS 2020-2024 5-year estimates released December 2025 accessible via data.census.gov and the Census API
IRS SOI ZIP code data covers tax years 1998 2001 2004-2022 as ZIP-compressed state Excel files
HUD CHAS data most recent release is 2018-2022 ACS-based released 23 December 2025 with tract/place/MCD/county/state geographies and CSV format
HUD Picture of Subsidized Households 2024 data dictionary available on HUD USER portal
HUD Fair Market Rents FY2026 effective 21 May 2026 available at HUD USER with API
HMDA Data Browser hosted at ffiec.cfpb.gov with 2025 Modified LAR released April 2026
Opportunity Insights publishes Opportunity Atlas and Social Capital Atlas with tract-level data downloadable in CSV and STATA
Cook County Assessor open data available on Cook County Data Portal with CCAO tag; CCAO also maintains GitHub repo
USDA Food Access Research Atlas current vintage 2019 with tract-level LILATracts flag and Shapefile/XLSX format
USDA Food Environment Atlas updated 3 March 2026 with county-level food environment indicators
USDA SNAP Retailer Locator historical data current through 31 December 2025 available as zipped CSV
EPA EJScreen was removed from the EPA website on 5 February 2025; Public Environmental Data Partners hosts reconstructed 2.3 version
EJScreen 2015-2023 data available in Harvard Dataverse archive
EPA AirNow offers real-time PM2.5 and ozone data via API at docs.airnowapi.org
NaNDA National Neighborhood Data Archive hosted on ICPSR with tract ZCTA and county tables
FBI Crime Data Explorer hosts bulk NIBRS files including master files back to 1985
Gun Violence Archive provides Export to CSV from report pages; mass shooting report 2026 available
Head Start Service Location Datasets builder available on headstart.gov
SAMHSA N-SSATS and N-MHSS were merged in 2021 into N-SUMHSS; 2024 survey data available
HRSA UDS 2024 Health Center data available on HRSA Data Warehouse with February 2025 submission deadline
HRSA AHRF 2024-2025 release on HRSA Data Warehouse with 86 files updated 18 December 2025 county-level
Mapping Inequality HOLC project on University of Richmond DSL hosts 7148 neighborhoods across 143 cities in Shapefile and GeoJSON
Chicago Crimes 2001 to Present dataset on Chicago Data Portal with Socrata API and daily update
Illinois IDPH Vital Statistics page publishes Chicago and county-level vital records including infant mortality 1920-2018
AFFH Data Tool (AFFH-T) remained accessible in 2026 but HUD withdrew the 2023 AFFH rule in March 2025 in favor of self-certification
Eviction Lab data accessible via email form with tract and block-group level 2000-2016 historical plus ongoing tracking
Metropolitan Planning Council Chicago operates at metroplanning.org with transit zoning and planning research resources
Northwestern Institute for Policy Research maintains Research Tools & Apps at ipr.northwestern.edu
CDC PLACES 2024 release shifted to 2020 census-tract geographies from 2010 geographies used in prior releases
HUD Housing Choice Voucher poverty-map tool at huduser.gov/portal/maps/hcv is marked as no longer updated
